data.title: Lockheed Martin Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: The Orion spacecraft has accomplished a milestone journey around the moon, marking a significant achievement. Lockheed Martin and the Department of Defense have entered into multiyear agreements to enhance the production of munitions. This collaboration underscores a commitment to bolster national defense capabilities. The company reported impressive financial figures, with sales totaling $18.0 billion and net earnings of $1.5 billion, equivalent to $6.44 per share. Furthermore, cash flow from operations amounted to $220 million, showcasing robust financial performance.

data.title: Best Gatlinburg Vacation Packages: Westgate Resorts Recognized for Water Park Access and Affordability by Expert Consumers
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 23, 2026, Expert Consumers has bestowed recognition upon Westgate Resorts for its exceptional contribution to crafting top-quality vacation packages in Gatlinburg. Situated in Tennessee, Westgate Resorts has been praised for delivering meticulously planned travel experiences that cater to a variety of preferences. The acknowledgment emphasizes the company's dedication to offering structured and diverse vacation options for travelers in the region.

data.title: Trading Academy® Launches Advanced Hedge Fund Strategies and Tactics Program, Bridging Institutional Theory with Live Capital Experience
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Irvine, California, Trading Academy® introduced its newest program, Advanced Hedge Fund Strategies and Tactics. This program offers an immersive learning experience for students, focusing on providing them with the necessary skills, tools, and real-world experience to excel in the financial industry. The program aims to equip students with advanced knowledge in hedge fund strategies and tactics to thrive in institutional environments.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Reports 2026 First-Quarter Earnings
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Huntington had a robust beginning marked by significant organic growth and outstanding credit performance. Their earnings per common share (EPS) stood at $0.25 for the quarter, reflecting a decrease of $0.05 from the previous quarter and a decline of $0.09 compared to the same quarter last year. data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. Commences Trading on the OTCQX Best Market in the United States
data.description: Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSX.V: HMMC) is excited to share that their OTCQX trading as HMMCF is progressing, aligning with their plan to expand investor reach and boost trading liquidity throughout North American capital markets. This development was made public on April 23, 2026, as Hemlo Mining continues to implement its strategic objectives.

data.title: CGI implements multi-agent AI solution for SOK Finance to accelerate financial service operations
data.description: CGI, listed as GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE, announced a new solution involving AI and AWS Bedrock to manage high-volume financial customer service requests for the S Group. This initiative, launched in Helsinki on April 23, 2026, aims to enhance operations and efficiency in handling customer queries.

data.title: Baker Hughes Likely To Report Lower Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Oilfield services company Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Thursday, April 23. Analysts predict earnings of 49 cents per share, a decline from the 51 cents per share reported last year. The expected quarterly revenue is $6.33 billion, slightly lower than the previous year's $6.43 billion. Recently, Baker Hughes agreed to sell its Waygate Technologies business to Hexagon (OTC: HXGBY) for about $1.45 billion in cash. The company's stock rose by 3.8% to $62.54 at the close of trading on Wednesday. For further details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: Spectrum Brands Holdings to Report Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results and Hold Conference Call and Webcast on May 7, 2026
data.description: Middleton, Wisconsin-based Spectrum Brands Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPB) revealed plans to unveil its fiscal 2026 second quarter financial results for the period concluding on March 29, 2026, prior to the market opening on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company, a prominent global provider of branded consumer products and home essentials, is dedicated to fostering innovation and delivering exceptional customer service. A live conference call and webcast are scheduled by Spectrum Brands for May 7, 2026, at 9:00 AM.

data.title: SpaceX Warns Investors Of Chip Supply Risks As Elon Musk Targets In-House GPUs
data.description: SpaceX, a leading commercial space flight company, has cautioned investors about potential supply chain risks as it expands its in-house AI computing operations. According to S-1 filings reviewed by Reuters, SpaceX identified its in-house chip manufacturing as a significant capital expenditure. The company mentioned the absence of long-term supplier contracts and its ongoing reliance on third-party suppliers for a considerable portion of its computing needs. SpaceX expressed uncertainty about achieving its objectives related to TERAFAB within the expected timelines. The news also mentioned an upcoming environmental protest at Starbase as investors visited SpaceX ahead of its IPO. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Helix and Hornbeck to Combine to Create a Premier Integrated Offshore Services Company
data.description: In Houston and Covington, Louisiana, Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. ("Helix") (NYSE: HLX) and Hornbeck Offshore Services, Inc. ("Hornbeck") have announced a merger through an all-stock deal, creating a leading integrated offshore services entity. The agreement will result in Hornbeck shareholders owning about 55% and Helix shareholders owning around 45% of the new combined company post-transaction.

data.title: Corpower Ocean AB: Why Wave Energy Must Be the UK's Next Great Green Frontier
data.description: In London on April 23, 2026, it was disclosed that the UK, an island nation with over 11,000 miles of coastline, has access to a significant but often neglected renewable energy source: ocean waves. While offshore wind energy has been the focus of Britain's clean energy efforts for many years, the potential of harnessing ocean waves is now being recognized.
